title: [InstCombine] Extend fcmp+select folding to minnum/maxnum intrinsics

tests.source_program:
define float @loop_fmax_recurrence_ult(float %start, float* %ptr, i32 %n) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:
  %i = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %next, %loop ]
  %acc = phi float [ %start, %entry ], [ %max, %loop ]
  %val = load float, float* %ptr
  %cmp = fcmp fast ult float %acc, %val
  %max = select i1 %cmp, float %val, float %acc
  %next = add i32 %i, 1
  %cond = icmp slt i32 %next, %n
  br i1 %cond, label %loop, label %exit

exit:
  ret float %acc
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define float @loop_fmax_recurrence_ult(float %start, float* %ptr, i32 %n) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:
  %i = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %next, %loop ]
  %acc = phi float [ %start, %entry ], [ %max, %loop ]
  %val = load float, float* %ptr
  %max = call fast float @llvm.maxnum.f32(float %acc, float %val)
  %next = add i32 %i, 1
  %cond = icmp slt i32 %next, %n
  br i1 %cond, label %loop, label %exit

exit:
  ret float %acc
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions IVDescriptors for recurrence analysis but existing tests don't cover loop recurrence patterns; this tests FMax recognition in loop phi node context via IVDescriptors path

alive2.src:
define float @loop_fmax_recurrence_ult(float %start, float* %ptr, i32 %n) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:
  %i = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %next, %loop ]
  %acc = phi float [ %start, %entry ], [ %max, %loop ]
  %val = load float, float* %ptr
  %cmp = fcmp fast ult float %acc, %val
  %max = select i1 %cmp, float %val, float %acc
  %next = add i32 %i, 1
  %cond = icmp slt i32 %next, %n
  br i1 %cond, label %loop, label %exit

exit:
  ret float %acc
}
alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define float @loop_fmax_recurrence_ult(float %start, ptr %ptr, i32 %n) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %i = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %next, %loop ]
  %acc = phi float [ %start, %entry ], [ %max, %loop ]
  %val = load float, ptr %ptr, align 4
  %max = call fast float @llvm.maxnum.f32(float %acc, float %val)
  %next = add i32 %i, 1
  %cond = icmp slt i32 %next, %n
  br i1 %cond, label %loop, label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret float %acc
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare float @llvm.maxnum.f32(float, float) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }
